step_rationale: Lipid oxidation product; pro-inflammatory via LDL remodeling.
mechanism: Lysophosphatidylcholine is a lipid oxidation product and inflammatory mediator associated with lipoprotein modification and vascular inflammation in atherosclerotic plaques.

references.title: The Synergistic Mechanism of Total Saponins and Flavonoids in Notoginseng-Safflower against Myocardial Infarction Using a Comprehensive Metabolomics Strategy.
